docstring:
/**
 * @brief Deregister the transactional-memory clone table at shutdown.
 *
 * Compiler-generated CRT helper emitted by GCC into every linked
 * executable/shared object. It is invoked from the module's destructor
 * chain (e.g. `__do_global_dtors_aux`) and is the counterpart to
 * `register_tm_clones`.
 *
 * The function tests the weak symbol `_ITM_deregisterTMCloneTable`. If
 * no GNU TM runtime is linked into the process the symbol resolves to
 * NULL and the routine returns immediately; otherwise the TM runtime
 * is asked to drop the clone table that spans up to `__TMC_END__`.
 *
 * @return None.
 *
 * @note This is boilerplate produced by the toolchain, not user code;
 *       it has no parameters and no observable side effects unless a
 *       transactional-memory runtime is present.
 */
assumptions: This is the canonical GCC-emitted deregister_tm_clones CRT routine; rewritten to its idiomatic source form rather than a literal transliteration of the obfuscated PIC-relative pseudocode.

The first compare (ret == arg0 where ret = __TMC_END__) corresponds to the linker-resolved comparison of __TMC_END__ against itself, which the linker collapses; in source form the meaningful guard is the NULL-check on the weak _ITM_deregisterTMCloneTable symbol.
The indirect load *&[offset+0x3fe0] is the GOT slot for the weak symbol _ITM_deregisterTMCloneTable; modeled as taking the address of the weak function rather than fabricating a helper.
The call argument is __TMC_END__ (the symbol/array), matching the load 'ret = __TMC_END__' that is then passed as the sole argument.
Declared __TMC_END__ as an extern array so that its name decays to its address when passed, matching the pseudocode's use of the symbol value as the argument.
Removed the trivially-true self-equality early-return branch since it has no source-level meaning.
divergences: [low] control_flow: The original pseudocode has two early-return checks: first comparing __TMC_END__ to arg0, then a NULL check on the GOT slot. The rewrite removes the first (trivially-true at link time per the canonical CRT idiom) and keeps only the NULL check. Behaviorally equivalent in the canonical GCC pattern.

[low] other: Rewrite passes __TMC_END__ symbol (decayed array address) as the argument. Pseudocode shows 'ret(__TMC_END__)' where ret was loaded from the GOT slot — the called function pointer is _ITM_deregisterTMCloneTable. Matches canonical pattern.
